summary: Comprehensive testing of Task Metrics on Home Dashboard and enhanced Tasks page filters. All features verified working correctly: 4 task metric tiles on home dashboard (Assigned to Me, Created by Me, Overdue, High Severity), old metric tiles removed, tile click navigation to /tasks with correct filters, 6 metric tiles on Tasks page, comprehensive filters (View, Status, Department, Severity), and Clear filters button.
critical_code_review_comments: All 4 home dashboard tiles have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Tile click navigation uses correct URL params: view=my_tasks, view=assigned_by_me, overdue=true, severity=high
Tasks page has 6 metric tiles with clickable filters
URL params persist correctly when filters are applied
Clear filters button appears when filters are active
Old metric tiles (Activities, Calls, Emails, Meetings) successfully removed from home dashboard
No 'New Task' button in Action Items widget on home dashboard
seed_data_creation: Test tasks created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Task metrics on home dashboard and enhanced Tasks page filters are fully functional. Home Dashboard shows 4 task metric tiles that navigate to /tasks with appropriate filters. Tasks page has 6 metric tiles, comprehensive filters (View, Status, Department, Severity), and Clear filters button. Backend endpoints /api/task-management/tasks/my-dashboard-stats and /api/task-management/tasks/stats both working correctly.

Tasks_Page_Metrics.data_testid: task-stats, task-stat-total, task-stat-assigned-to-me, task-stat-created-by-me, task-stat-open, task-stat-overdue, task-stat-closed

Tasks_Page_Filters.view_filter: All Tasks, Assigned to Me, Created by Me, Watching
Tasks_Page_Filters.status_filter: All Status, Open, In Progress, In Review, Closed

Backend_APIs.my_dashboard_stats: GET /api/task-management/tasks/my-dashboard-stats - Returns assigned_to_me, created_by_me, overdue, high_severity
